Localization.Description: The registry key responsible for redirecting to help for the Event Viewer component has been changed. An attacker can put in it the path to the file that will be executed when getting help, to be persisted on the target system

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Process {subject.process.name} changed registry key {object.name} responsible for redirection to the Event Viewer help to {object.new_value} on host {event_src.host}
